revision.text:
[[ja:伊射奈美神社 (美馬町)]] {{Expand Japanese|伊射奈美神社 (美馬町)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Izanami Shrine, Mima | native_name = 伊射奈美神社 | image = Izanami Shrine, Mima.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Izanami Shrine, Mima | coordinates = {{coord|34.04241666666667|134.01097222222222}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Izanami|lt=Izanami|ar|إزانامي|az|İzanami|bcl|Izanami|bs|Izanami|ca|Izanami|da|Izanami|el|Ιζανάμι|en|Izanami|eo|Izanami|es|Izanami|fa|ایزانامی|fi|Izanami|fr|Izanami|he|איזאנמי|hr|Izanami|hu|Izanami|hy|Իզանամի|id|Izanami|it|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|ko|이자나미|mk|Изанами|mni|ꯏꯓꯥꯅꯥꯃꯤ|pt|Izanami|ru|Идзанами|simple|Izanami|sl|Izanami|sr|Изанами|sv|Izanami|ta|இசநமி|th|อิซานามิ|tl|Izanami|tr|Izanami|uk|Ідзанамі|zh|伊邪那美|qid=Q682306|1=Izanami}} }} {{nihongo|'''Izanami Shrine, Mima'''|伊射奈美神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11657514|ltq=Q11657514|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 10 ** P155: {{ill|Yokotano Shrine|lt=Yokotano Shrine|qid=Q135041307|1=Yokotano Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135041309|ltq=Q135041309|qid=Q135041309|1=Takeno Shrine (Q135041309)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q857828|ltq=Q857828|qid=Q857828|1=Mima, Tokushima}} * {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=Awa Province|be|Ава (правінцыя, Сікоку)|cs|Provincie Awa (Tokušima)|de|Provinz Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|es|Provincia de Awa (Tokushima)|fa|ولایت آوا|fr|Province d'Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Provincia de Awa, Tokushima|id|Provinsi Awa (Tokushima)|it|Awa (provincia, Tokushima)|ja|阿波国|ko|아와국 (난카이도)|lt|Avos žemė (Tokušima)|nl|Awa (Tokushima)|pt|Província de Awa (Tokushima)|ru|Ава (Сикоку)|simple|Awa Province (Tokushima)|sk|Awa (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Q1156496|ltq=Q1156496|qid=Q1156496|1=Mima District, Tokushima}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.04241666666667|134.01097222222222}} == image (P18) == * Izanami Shrine, Mima.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Izanami|lt=Izanami|ar|إزانامي|az|İzanami|bcl|Izanami|bs|Izanami|ca|Izanami|da|Izanami|el|Ιζανάμι|en|Izanami|eo|Izanami|es|Izanami|fa|ایزانامی|fi|Izanami|fr|Izanami|he|איזאנמי|hr|Izanami|hu|Izanami|hy|Իզանամի|id|Izanami|it|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|ko|이자나미|mk|Изанами|mni|ꯏꯓꯥꯅꯥꯃꯤ|pt|Izanami|ru|Идзанами|simple|Izanami|sl|Izanami|sr|Изанами|sv|Izanami|ta|இசநமி|th|อิซานามิ|tl|Izanami|tr|Izanami|uk|Ідзанамі|zh|伊邪那美|qid=Q682306|1=Izanami}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183184 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11545372|ltq=Q11545372|qid=Q11545372|1=Senior Sixth Rank}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6480005005073 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Isanamino Shrine|lt=Isanamino Shrine|qid=Q135041308|1=Isanamino Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県美馬市美馬町中鳥338', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県美馬市穴吹町三島', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:伊射奈美神社 (美馬町)]] {{wikidata link|Q43594855}} == Japanese content == {{otheruses|The shrine in Mima-chō, Mima City|the one in Anabuki-chō in the same city|Izanami Shrine (Anabuki-chō)}} {{神社 |名称 = Izanami Shrine |画像 = [[File:Izanami Shrine, Mima.jpg|250px|Izanami Shrine (Mima-chō)]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Mima|Q857828|qid=Q857828|1=Mima, Tokushima}} Mima-chō Nakatori 338 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami no Mikoto|1=Izanami}}
{{ill|lt=Kumano Gongen|Q11568925|qid=Q11568925|lt=Hayatama no Otoko-gami|1=Kumano Gongen}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kotosakanoo no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |神体 = |社格 = |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=伊射奈美
神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Izanami Shrine''' (いざなみじんじゃ) is a shrine in Nakatori, {{ill|lt=Mima-chō|Q11609479|qid=Q11609479|1=Mimachō}}, {{ill|lt=Mima|Q857828|qid=Q857828|1=Mima, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === History === Its founding is unknown. It is one of the candidate shrines (Ronsha) for the Shikinaisha "Izanami Shrine, Mima District, Awa Province." Another Ronsha of the same shrine name is {{ill|lt=Izanami Shrine (Anabuki-chō)|Q43594845|qid=Q43594845|lt=Izanami Shrine|1=Izanami Shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Anabuki-chō Mishima|Q28689958|qid=Q28689958|1=Anabuki-chō Mishima}} in the same city''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|qid=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' (1986, ISBN 4040013603). === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami no Mikoto|1=Izanami}} * {{ill|lt=Kumano Gongen|Q11568925|qid=Q11568925|lt=Hayatama no Otoko-gami|1=Kumano Gongen}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kotosakanoo no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Access === * About 5 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Awa-Handa Station|Q4829609|qid=Q4829609|1=Awa-Handa Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|qid=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|qid=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === Notes === {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Izanami Shrine, Mima]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Izanami Shrine, Mima]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:美馬市の歴史]] [[Category:美馬市の建築物]]
